name: BTF50Z Mini Fresnel

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A4A45DA1-5D53-453A-985E-302F278E0179

comment: BTF50Z Mini Fresnel Zoom 2x 50W LED WW/CW: The BeamZ BTF50Z is a compact mini LED Fresnel specially designed for short distance wash applications. The power of the 2x 50W tuneable COB LED (2700K – 6500K) is perfectly exploited, thanks to the Fresnel filter. Featuring a 25-90 degree manual zoom function, high quality optics and the use of a compact aluminium housing this mini Fresnel is ideal for theatres, schools, exhibitions and display lighting.
